headerDisplay: Local LAN control for Tuya/HomeMate devices — 3+1 switch panels, Wipro Smart Plug, and Wipro Batten/RGBTW lights. Enter the device name, type, Tuya device ID and local key. IP and protocol version are auto-discovered.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Friendly name shown in the Home app.

type.title: Device Type
type.description: The data-point map and protocol version are built in for each type.

id.title: Tuya Device ID
id.description: The Tuya device ID (from the Smart Life / Tuya app).

key.title: Local Key
key.description: The Tuya local key. Enter it exactly as provided; symbol keys are supported.

ip.title: IP Address (optional)
ip.description: Leave blank to auto-discover on the LAN. Set a static/reserved IP for instant startup — recommended for the HomeMate panel.

exposeEnergy.title: Expose Energy Metering (Smart Plug only)
exposeEnergy.description: Enable Eve-compatible power, voltage, current and energy characteristics. Visible in Eve or Controller for HomeKit. Disable for full Matter/Apple Home compliance.

tuyaId.title: Local Device ID Override (advanced)
tuyaId.description: Set only if state reads correctly but control does nothing after re-pairing in Smart Life. Enter the current local gwId (find with 'tinytuya scan'). Leave blank normally.
